HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT KRISTA RICHARDS' WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. KRISTA RICHARDS HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II; CLERK: D. calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-05-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-05-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, CSR: Mitch Lyon
Atty. Steven E. Littman, Esq. for for Plaintiff: .
Plaintiff's Witness: David Solis, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: KRISTA RICHARDS .
EXH.1 - LEASE AGREEMENT -------------------ID/EVID.
EXH. 2- NOTICE TO PAY RENT - - - - - - - - ID/EVID.
EXH. 3- PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE - - - - ID/EVID

After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff FILLMORE CENTER ASSOCIATES INC. and against the Defendant KRISTA RICHARDS as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at
1755 O"FARRELL STREET UNIT #1012, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94115.
Rental Agreement declared forfeited.
PRINCIPAL - $3,198.00 (BACK RENT)
COST -$310.00 ATTY'S FEE - $500.00
TOTAL JUDGMENT - $4,008.00
Judgment signed in open court.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibits in court.

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar Jan-31-2007 Denied
